hebrew: תתקמ״ח — אברם נולד בשנת תתקמ״ח, שבעים לחיי תרח; ובו נשלמו עשרה דורות מנח עד אברהם. גם אחיו נחור והרן נולדו בפרק זה.
english: AM 1948 — Abram was born in the year 1948, in the seventieth year of Terah's life; and with him were completed the ten generations from Noah to Abraham. His brothers Nahor and Haran, too, were born in this period.
notes: Independent English machine translation from restored Hebrew (OCR page 8).
